title: The (In)Famous Youssef Salem
overview: Youssef Salem, 45, has always managed to miss his writing career. But the trouble begins when his new novel becomes a success because Youssef couldn't help but be inspired by his own, for better or worse. He must now avoid at all costs that his book falls into the hands of his family.

trailers.title: YOUSSEF SALEM A DU SUCCÈS | Bande annonce
